Id1.text: Purple Heart recipient Aaron S. Daggett was born in Maine and, most notably, fought in the Battle of Fredericksburg.

Id3.text: Aaron S Daggett, born in Maine, fought in the Battle of Fredericksburg. He was given the Purple Heart.
